enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These directions shall be known as the 'Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Account Aggregator) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: 'Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Account Aggregator) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These directions shall come into force with effect on the day they are placed on the
website of the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: effect on the day they are placed on the website of the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to Non-Banking Financial Companies -
Account Aggregators (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFC-AAs' and
individually as an 'NBFC-AA').
enriched_requirements.object: Financial Companies - Account Aggregators (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFC-AAs' and individually as an 'NBF

conditions:
where not contradictory to the
contents of these Directions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions contained in the following directions, where not contradictory to the
contents of these Directions, shall be applicable to an NBFC-AA:
(1) Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Registration,
Exemptions and Framework for Scale Based Regulation) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: NBFC-AA: (1) Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Registration, Exemptions and Framework for Scale Based Regul

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It may be noted that the
provisions of paragraphs 12, 13, 17(1) and 18 shall be applicable to NBFC-
AA, despite the categorization of NBFC-AA as NBFCs-BL under SBR
Framework.
enriched_requirements.object: AA, despite the categorization of NBFC-AA as NBFCs-BL under SBR Framework

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Notwithstanding the above, the instructions contained in these Directions shall be
applicable to an NBFC-AA in addition and not in substitution to the other relevant
instructions contained in the directions mentioned in paragraph 4 above.
enriched_requirements.object: NBFC-AA in addition and not in substitution to the other relevant instructions contained in the directions mentioned in paragraph

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
NBFC-AA shall always remain in the Base Layer of the regulatory structure
specified in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Registration,
Exemptions and Framework for Scale Based Regulation) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Base Layer of the regulatory structure specified in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Registration, Exempt

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) 'bank' means -
a) a banking company;
enriched_requirements.object: company

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
or
e) such other bank which the Reserve Bank may, by
notification, specify for the purposes of these
directions;
enriched_requirements.object: for the purposes of these directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) 'Banking company' means a banking company as defined in clause (c) of
section 5 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (10 of 1949);
enriched_requirements.object: defined in clause (c) of section 5 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (10 of 1949)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) 'business of an account aggregator' means the business of providing
under a contract, the service of, retrieving or collecting such financial
information pertaining to its customer, as may be specified by the
Reserve Bank from time to time;
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve Bank from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
consolidating, organizing and presenting such information to the
customer or any other financial information user as may be specified by
the Reserve Bank;
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, the financial information pertaining to the customer shall
not be the property of the Account Aggregator, and not be used in any
other manner.
enriched_requirements.object: the Account Aggregator, and not be used in any other manner
section 3 of the Companies Act, 1956 or a company registered under sub section (20) of section 2 of the Companies Act, 2013
entered into a contractual arrangement with the Account Aggregator to avail services provided by the Account Aggregator
been granted a certificate of registration under sub-section (1A) of section 12 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India Act,
sub-section (1A) of section 12 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India Act, 1992

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(9) 'Financial Information' means information in respect of the following with
financial information providers:
Note: Clearing Corporation of India Limited shall provide financial
information on Government Securities held by retail investors in their
Retail Direct Gilt accounts under Retail Direct Scheme.
enriched_requirements.object: Government Securities held by retail investors in their Retail Direct Gilt accounts under Retail Direct Scheme

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(12) 'Financial Information User' means an entity registered with and
regulated by any financial sector regulator;
enriched_requirements.object: and regulated by any financial sector regulator

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(13) 'Insurance Repository' means a company formed under the Companies
Act, 1956 and which has been granted a certificate of registration by
Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India (IRDAI) for
maintaining data of insurance policies in electronic form on behalf of
insurers.
enriched_requirements.object: the Companies Act, 1956 and which has been granted a certificate of registration by Insurance Regulatory and Development Author

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(14) 'Leverage Ratio' means the ratio of the Outside Liabilities excluding
borrowings/ loans from the group entities to Owned Funds.
enriched_requirements.object: Outside Liabilities excluding borrowings/ loans from the group entities to Owned Funds
the Companies Act and which has been granted certificate of registration by the Reserve Bank under section 45IA of the Act

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(xx) Any other information as may be specified by the Reserve
Bank for the purposes of these directions, from time to time;
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve Bank for the purposes of these directions, from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(10) 'Financial Sector Regulator' for the purpose of these directions, shall
mean the Reserve Bank of India, Securities and Exchange Board of
India, Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India, Pension
Fund Regulatory and Development Authority and Department of
Revenue, Ministry of Finance;
enriched_requirements.object: of India, Securities and Exchange Board of India, Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India, Pension Fund Regulato

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(11) 'Financial Information Provider' means bank, banking company, non-
banking financial company, asset management company, depository,
depository participant, insurance company, insurance repository, Central
Recordkeeping Agency, Goods and Services Tax Network (GSTN),
Clearing Corporation of India Limited and such other entity as may be
identified by the Reserve Bank for the purposes of these directions, from
time to time;
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve Bank for the purposes of these directions, from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Words or expressions used in these directions but not defined herein but defined
in the Act, shall have the same meaning as assigned to them under the Act.
enriched_requirements.object: as assigned to them under the Act

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any other
words or expressions not defined in the Act, shall have the same meaning assigned
to them in the Companies Act, 2013.
enriched_requirements.object: assigned to them in the Companies Act, 2013

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The NBFC-AA shall put in place Board approved policies and establish periodic
review mechanisms to ensure sound processes and systems.
enriched_requirements.object: approved policies and establish periodic review mechanisms to ensure sound processes and systems

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The registration requirements for an NBFC-AA shall be as under:
(1) No entity other than a company shall undertake the business of an Account
Aggregator.
enriched_requirements.object: No entity other than a company shall undertake the business of an Account Aggregator

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) No company shall commence or carry on the business of an Account
Aggregator without obtaining a certificate of registration from the Reserve
Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: the business of an Account Aggregator without obtaining a certificate of registration from the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, entities being regulated by other financial sector regulators
and aggregating only those accounts relating to the financial information
pertaining to customers of that particular sector will be excluded from the
above registration requirement.
enriched_requirements.object: by other financial sector regulators and aggregating only those accounts relating to the financial information pertaining t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Every company seeking registration with the Reserve Bank as an NBFC-AA
shall have a net owned fund of not less than rupees two crore, or such higher
amount as the Reserve Bank may specify.
enriched_requirements.object: fund of not less than rupees two crore, or such higher amount as the Reserve Bank may specify

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, those companies not having a Net Owned Fund of minimum
of Rupees two crore at the time of seeking registration, shall meet the Net
Owned Fund criteria within the period of validity of the in-principle approval
for grant of certification of registration given by the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: Fund criteria within the period of validity of the in-principle approval for grant of certification of registration given by the Re

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The process of registration as an NBFC-AA is as under:
(1) Every company seeking registration as an NBFC-AA shall make an application
for registration on the PRAVAAH portal to the Department of Regulation,
Mumbai of the Reserve Bank, in the form specified by the Reserve Bank for
the purpose.
enriched_requirements.object: registration on the PRAVAAH portal to the Department of Regulation, Mumbai of the Reserve Bank, in the form specified by the R

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The Reserve Bank for the purpose of considering the application for
registration shall require to be satisfied that the following conditions are
fulfilled:-
enriched_requirements.object: that the following conditions are fulfilled:-

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (vi) The company shall not have a leverage ratio of more than seven.
enriched_requirements.object: of more than seven

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(vii) That the public interest shall be served by the grant of certificate of
registration to the Account Aggregator to commence or to carry on the
business in India.
enriched_requirements.object: grant of certificate of registration to the Account Aggregator to commence or to carry on the business in India

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(viii) Any other condition that may be specified by the Reserve Bank from
time to time, the fulfilment of which in the opinion of the Reserve Bank
shall be necessary to ensure that the commencement of or carrying on the
business in India shall not be prejudicial to the public interest.
enriched_requirements.object: public interest

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The Reserve Bank may, after being satisfied that the conditions specified
under sub-paragraph (2) are fulfilled, grant in-principle approval for registering
as an NBFC-AA subject to such conditions as it may consider fit to impose.
enriched_requirements.object: that the conditions specified under sub-paragraph (2) are fulfilled, grant in-principle approval for registering as an NBFC-AA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) Within the period of twelve months, the company shall put in place the
technology platform, enter into all other legal documentations required to be
ready for operations and report position of compliance with the terms of grant
of in-principle approval to the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: technology platform, enter into all other legal documentations required to be ready for operations and report position of compliance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Reserve Bank may, after
being satisfied that the company is ready to commence operations and in
compliance with the registration requirements, grant it a Certificate of
Registration as an NBFC - AA subject to such conditions as it may consider fit
to impose.
enriched_requirements.object: that the company is ready to commence operations and in compliance with the registration requirements, grant it a Certificate

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) The Reserve Bank may cancel the certificate of registration granted to an
NBFC-AA , if such company -
enriched_requirements.object: registration granted to an NBFC-AA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The companies seeking Certification of Registration as an NBFC-AA shall refer
to the instructions as prescribed in paragraphs 47 and 48 of Reserve Bank of India
(Non-Banking Financial Companies - Registration, Exemptions and Framework for
Scale Based Regulation) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: as prescribed in paragraphs 47 and 48 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Registration, Exemptions a

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The duties and responsibilities of an NBFC-AA are as under:
(1) NBFC-AA shall provide services to a customer based on the customer's
explicit consent.
enriched_requirements.object: customer based on the customer's explicit consent

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) NBFC-AA shall ensure that the providing of services to a customer shall be
backed by appropriate agreements/ authorisations between the NBFC-AA, the
customer and the Financial Information Providers.
enriched_requirements.object: of services to a customer shall be backed by appropriate agreements/ authorisations between the NBFC-AA, the customer and th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (3) NBFC-AA shall not support transactions by customers.

(4) NBFC-AA shall ensure appropriate mechanisms for proper customer
identification.
enriched_requirements.object: proper customer identification

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) NBFC-AA shall share information as referred to under paragraph 8(4) only
with the customer to whom it relates or any other financial information user as
authorised by the customer in accordance with the terms of the consent provided
by the customer.
enriched_requirements.object: to under paragraph 8(4) only with the customer to whom it relates or any other financial information user as authorised

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) NBFC-AA shall not undertake any other business other than the business of
account aggregator.
enriched_requirements.object: other than the business of account aggregator

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Deployment of investible surplus by an NBFC-AA in
instruments, not for trading, shall however be permitted.

(7) No financial information of the customer accessed by the NBFC-AA from the
financial information providers shall reside with the NBFC-AA.

(8) NBFC-AA shall not use the services of a third party service provider for
undertaking the business of account aggregation.
enriched_requirements.object: a third party service provider for undertaking the business of account aggregation

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(9) User authentication credentials of customers relating to accounts with various
Financial Information Providers shall not be accessed by the NBFC-AA.
enriched_requirements.object: NBFC-AA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(10) NBFC-AA shall have a Citizen's Charter that explicitly guarantees protection
of the rights of a customer.
enriched_requirements.object: that explicitly guarantees protection of the rights of a customer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The NBFC-AA shall not part with any information that
it may come to acquire from/ on behalf of a customer without the explicit consent
of the customer.
enriched_requirements.object: that it may come to acquire from/ on behalf of a customer without the explicit consent of the customer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(11) In the event of any difference in position of financial information in the
statement generated by/from the NBFC-AA and the books of the Financial
Information Provider, the position as reflected in the records of the Financial
Information Provider shall be considered as correct.

No financial information of the customer shall be retrieved, shared or transferred
by the NBFC-AA without the explicit consent of the customer.
enriched_requirements.object: transferred by the NBFC-AA without the explicit consent of the customer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC-AA shall perform the function of obtaining, submitting and managing
the customer's consent in accordance with these directions.
enriched_requirements.object: obtaining, submitting and managing the customer's consent in accordance with these directions
artefact which shall contain the following details, namely: -- (1) identity of the customer and optional contact information

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
(7) any other attribute as may be prescribed by the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
At the time of obtaining consent, the NBFC-AA shall inform the customer of all
necessary attributes to be contained in the consent artefact as per paragraph 17
above and the right of the customer to file complaints with relevant authorities in case
of non-redressal of grievances.
enriched_requirements.object: all necessary attributes to be contained in the consent artefact as per paragraph 17 above and the right of the customer to fil

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
NBFC-AA shall also provide its customers a functionality to revoke consent to
obtain information that is rendered accessible by a consent artefact, including the
ability to revoke consent to obtain parts of such information.
enriched_requirements.object: a functionality to revoke consent to obtain information that is rendered accessible by a consent artefact, including the ab

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Upon revocation, a fresh
consent artefact shall be shared with the Financial Information provider.
enriched_requirements.object: Financial Information provider

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An electronic consent artefact shall be capable of being logged, audited and
verified.
enriched_requirements.object: logged, audited and verified

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Financial Information Providers shall share financial information of a customer
with an NBFC-AA on being presented a valid consent artefact by an NBFC-AA in
accordance with paragraphs 15 to 21.
enriched_requirements.object: a customer with an NBFC-AA on being presented a valid consent artefact by an NBFC-AA in accordance with paragraphs 15 t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Upon being presented the consent artefact, the Financial Information Provider
shall verify:
(1) validity of consent
(2) specified dates and usage;
enriched_requirements.object: consent (2) specified dates and usage

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Upon due verification, the Financial Information Providers shall digitally sign the
financial information and securely transmit the same to the NBFC-AA in accordance
with the terms contained in the consent artefact.
enriched_requirements.object: information and securely transmit the same to the NBFC-AA in accordance with the terms contained in the consent artefact

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: All responses of the Financial Information Provider shall be in real time.

To enable these data flows, the Financial Information Providers shall:
(1) implement interfaces that will allow an NBFC-AA to submit consent artefacts,
and authenticate each other, and would enable secure flow of financial information
to the NBFC-AA;
enriched_requirements.object: that will allow an NBFC-AA to submit consent artefacts, and authenticate each other, and would enable secure flow of financ

conditions:
if any, contained
in the consent artefact
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) adopt means to verify the consent including digital signatures, if any, contained
in the consent artefact;
enriched_requirements.object: including digital signatures

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) implement means to digitally sign the financial information that is shared by
them about the customers;
enriched_requirements.object: financial information that is shared by them about the customers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where financial information has been provided by a Financial Information
Provider to an NBFC-AA for transferring to a Financial Information User with the
customer's explicit consent, the NBFC-AA shall:
(1) verify the identity of the Financial Information User;
enriched_requirements.object: identity of the Financial Information User

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where financial information has been provided by a Financial Information
Provider to an NBFC-AA for transferring to the customer or to a Financial Information
User, it shall not be used or disclosed by an NBFC-AA or the Financial Information
User except as may be specified in the consent artefact.
enriched_requirements.object: by an NBFC-AA or the Financial Information User except as may be specified in the consent artefact

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
With a view to ensure efficient and optimum utilisation of the Account Aggregator
ecosystem, regulated entities of the Reserve Bank joining the Account Aggregator
ecosystem as Financial Information User shall necessarily join as Financial
Information Provider also, if they hold the specified financial information and fall under
the definition of Financial Information Provider.
enriched_requirements.object: Information Provider also

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
NBFC-AA shall adhere to the following:
(1) Business of an Account Aggregator will be entirely Information Technology
(IT) driven.
enriched_requirements.object: (1) Business of an Account Aggregator will be entirely Information Technology (IT) driven

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
NBFC-AA shall adopt required IT framework and interfaces to ensure
secure data flows from the Financial Information Providers to its own systems
and onwards to the Financial Information Users.
enriched_requirements.object: and interfaces to ensure secure data flows from the Financial Information Providers to its own systems and onwards to the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) NBFC-AA shall not request or store customer credentials (like passwords,
PINs, private keys) which may be used for authenticating customers to the
Financial Information providers.
enriched_requirements.object: credentials (like passwords, PINs, private keys) which may be used for authenticating customers to the Financial Information

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Access by an NBFC-AA to customer's
information shall only be based on consent-based authorisation.
enriched_requirements.object: consent-based authorisation

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The technology should also be scalable to cover any other financial
information or Financial Information Provider as may be specified by the Reserve
Bank in future.
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve Bank in future

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) There shall be adequate safeguards built in its IT systems to ensure that it is
protected against unauthorised access, alteration, destruction, disclosure or
dissemination of records and data.
enriched_requirements.object: in its IT systems to ensure that it is protected against unauthorised access, alteration, destruction, disclosure or diss

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) Appropriate measures for Disaster Risk Management and Business
Continuity shall be in place.

(6) Information System Audit of the internal systems and processes shall be in
place and shall be conducted at least once in two years by CISA certified external
auditors.
enriched_requirements.object: shall be conducted at least once in two years by CISA certified external auditors

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Report of the external auditor shall be submitted to the Regional Office
of the Department of Supervision of the Reserve Bank, under whose jurisdiction
the Registered Office of the NBFC-AA is located, within one month of submission
of the report by the external auditor.
enriched_requirements.object: Regional Office of the Department of Supervision of the Reserve Bank, under whose jurisdiction the Registered Office of the NBFC-A

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
NBFC-AA may make use of the 'Guidance Note on Operational Risk Management
and Operational Resilience', as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: 'Guidance Note on Operational Risk Management and Operational Resilience', as amended from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It shall be the responsibility of the NBFC-
AA to ensure that its IT systems have all features necessary to carry out its functions
strictly in conformity with these Directions as updated from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: the NBFC- AA to ensure that its IT systems have all features necessary to carry out its functions strictly in conformity with

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC-AA shall enable the customer to access a record of the consents
provided by him and the Financial Information Users with whom the information has
been shared.
enriched_requirements.object: access a record of the consents provided by him and the Financial Information Users with whom the information has been shared

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC-AA shall not use or access any customer information other than for
performing the business of account aggregator explicitly requested by the customer.
enriched_requirements.object: customer information other than for performing the business of account aggregator explicitly requested by the customer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC-AA shall have in place a Board approved policy for handling/ disposal
of customer grievances/ complaints.
enriched_requirements.object: Board approved policy for handling/ disposal of customer grievances/ complaints

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It shall have a dedicated setup to address
customer grievances/ complaints.
enriched_requirements.object: to address customer grievances/ complaints

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Customer complaints shall be handled/ disposed of by the NBFC-AA within such
time and in such manner as provided for in its Board approved policy, but in any case
not beyond a period of one month from its receipt.
enriched_requirements.object: by the NBFC-AA within such time and in such manner as provided for in its Board approved policy, but in any case not beyond a

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
At the operational level, NBFC-AA shall display the following information
prominently, for the benefit of customers, on the website and at the place/s of
business:
(1) the name and contact details (Telephone / Mobile nos.
enriched_requirements.object: prominently, for the benefit of customers, on the website and at the place/s of business: (1) the name and contact d

conditions: if the complaint / dispute is not redressed within a period of one month
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) that if the complaint / dispute is not redressed within a period of one month,
the customer may appeal to the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
NBFCs covered under the Reserve Bank - Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, 2021
(RBIOS, 2021) shall comply with the directions provided under the said Scheme.
enriched_requirements.object: provided under the said Scheme

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC-AA shall have adequate internal mechanisms for reviewing, monitoring
and evaluating its controls, systems, procedures and safeguards.
enriched_requirements.object: for reviewing, monitoring and evaluating its controls, systems, procedures and safeguards

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The integrity of the
IT systems shall be maintained at all times and all necessary precautions taken to
ensure that the records are not lost, destroyed or tampered with.
enriched_requirements.object: times and all necessary precautions taken to ensure that the records are not lost, destroyed or tampered with

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
NBFC-AA shall comply with the provisions of paragraph 8 of Reserve Bank of
India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: of paragraph 8 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
NBFC-AA shall comply with the provisions of paragraph 17(1) of Reserve Bank
of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: of paragraph 17(1) of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
NBFC-AA shall form a Nomination Committee consisting of not less than three
members of its Board of Directors to ensure 'fit and proper' status of proposed/
existing directors.
enriched_requirements.object: consisting of not less than three members of its Board of Directors to ensure 'fit and proper' status of proposed/ existin

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Nomination Committee shall be formed as prescribed in
paragraph 18 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies -
Governance) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: in paragraph 18 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025
management framework which shall include (1) A sound and robust technology risk management framework

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
To manage the integrated risk and evaluate overall risks faced, an NBFC-AA shall
form a Risk Management Committee either at the Board or executive level, consisting
of not less than three members of its Board of Directors.
enriched_requirements.object: Committee either at the Board or executive level, consisting of not less than three members of its Board of Directors

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Risk Management
Committee shall:
(1) give due consideration to factors such as reputation, customer confidence,
consequential impact and legal implications, with regard to investment in controls
and security measures for computer systems, networks, data centres, operations
and backup facilities.
enriched_requirements.object: consideration to factors such as reputation, customer confidence, consequential impact and legal implications, with regard to investmen

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
NBFC-AA shall:
(1) ensure that a policy is put in place with the approval of the Board of Directors
for ascertaining the fit and proper criteria of the directors / managing director / CEO
at the time of appointment, and on a continuing basis.
enriched_requirements.object: a policy is put in place with the approval of the Board of Directors for ascertaining the fit and proper criteria of the directors /

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The policy on the fit and
proper criteria shall be on the lines of the Directions as prescribed in paragraphs 12
and 13 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance)
Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: of the Directions as prescribed in paragraphs 12 and 13 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Direct

enriched_requirements.timeline: within 15 days of the close of the year
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The statement must reach
the Regional Office of the Reserve Bank within 15 days of the close of the year.
enriched_requirements.object: of the Reserve Bank within 15 days of the close of the year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
NBFC-AA shall comply with the disclosure requirements specified in Reserve
Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Financial Statements:
Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025, except provisions contained in
paragraphs 13 to 15 and paragraph 20.
enriched_requirements.object: requirements specified in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The prior written permission of the Reserve Bank shall be required for an NBFC-
AA for -
(1) Any takeover or acquisition of control or any change in the shareholding as
prescribed in paragraphs 6(1) and 6(2) of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies- Acquisition of Shareholding or Control) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: NBFC- AA for - (1) Any takeover or acquisition of control or any change in the shareholding as prescribed in paragraphs 6(1) and 6(

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In respect of prior approval as per requirement in paragraphs 50(1) and 50(2)
above, an NBFC-AA shall comply with the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 7
of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies- Acquisition of
Shareholding or Control) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: as prescribed in paragraph 7 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies- Acquisition of Shareholding or Co

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In respect of prior approval as per
requirement in paragraph 50(3) above, an NBFC-AA shall refer to the instructions as
prescribed in paragraph 11 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies- Governance) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: as prescribed in paragraph 11 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies- Governance) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
NBFC-AA shall comply with the provisions of paragraphs 8 to 10 of Reserve Bank
of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies- Acquisition of Shareholding or Control)
Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: of paragraphs 8 to 10 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies- Acquisition of Shareholding or Control) Di

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Every NBFC-AA shall communicate change of address, directors, auditors, etc.,
as prescribed in paragraphs 6 and 7 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Miscellaneous) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: directors, auditors, etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
NBFC-AA shall ensure compliance to the instructions as prescribed in paragraphs
11 to 13 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies- Acquisition of
Shareholding or Control) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: instructions as prescribed in paragraphs 11 to 13 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies- Acquisition of S

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
NBFC-AA shall comply with the provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on Declaration of Dividends) Directions,
2025.
enriched_requirements.object: of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on Declaration of Dividends) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
NBFC-AA shall conduct a self-assessment of their existing outsourcing
arrangements and bring these in line with the instructions as prescribed in Reserve
Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Managing Risks in Outsourcing)
Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: their existing outsourcing arrangements and bring these in line with the instructions as prescribed in Reserve Bank of In

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Reserve Bank may, from time to time, prescribe return/s to be submitted by
NBFC-AA as deemed fit.
enriched_requirements.object: time, prescribe return/s to be submitted by NBFC-AA as deemed fit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Reserve Bank may, at any time, cause an inspection by one or more of its
officers or employees or other persons, of any NBFC-AA and at any intervals as it
deems fit.
enriched_requirements.object: cause an inspection by one or more of its officers or employees or other persons, of any NBFC-AA and at any intervals as it deems fit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Reserve Bank can give any clarification in respect of the above directions
and such clarification shall be treated as part of these directions.
enriched_requirements.object: of these directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines repealed prior
to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further,
the repeal of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way
prejudicially affect:
(1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder;
enriched_requirements.object: affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be
instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment
may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in
force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these
Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
